licenseGate: All entries require final naming, rules, and Paizo licensed-material review before compendium publication.

sharedRules.saveDC: class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher
sharedRules.fourArms: Only one pair is active. Switching the active pair uses the standard SF2e Switch Hands action.
sharedRules.culturalOptions: Skill and lore benefits represent training, communities, or personal experience rather than biological destiny.

feats.mechanic: During daily preparations, integrate one toolkit you own. Deploying or stowing it takes one Interact action; while stowed it cannot be disarmed and occupies no hand.
Restore 2d6 + level Hit Points to yourself. Increase the healing by 1d6 at levels 9, 13, and 17. This is a repair effect.
During daily preparations choose a 25-foot climb Speed, 25-foot swim Speed, or 15-foot fly Speed until the next preparations.

feats.trigger: You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points.
feats.mechanic: Remain at 1 Hit Point and increase your wounded value by 1.
You are quickened. The extra action can be used only to Interact, Recall Knowledge, Seek, Step, or deploy or stow an integrated tool.
Your limited telepathy can convey simple emotions and concrete images to a creature without a shared language, but not sentences, commands, or abstract ideas.

feats.trigger: You are targeted by an attack you can perceive.
feats.mechanic: Gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If it misses, you can Step 5 feet.

feats.duration: until the start of your next turn
feats.mechanic: Gain a +1 status bonus to AC and saving throws.
Move up to 15 feet through creatures or solid objects. You must end in an open space you can perceive; otherwise the action fails and you remain in place.
Gain resistance 10 to physical damage and move through other creatures' spaces. Solid objects remain barriers except when using Phase Passage.
After observing a creature for 10 minutes, gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Impersonate that creature or a member of its culture for 24 hours.
Attempt to Escape with a +2 circumstance bonus. On a success, you can also Step.
You can replace a prepared identity with 10 minutes of work rather than downtime, and you can retain two prepared identities.
After studying a willing or observed humanoid for 1 hour, a prepared identity can duplicate that individual. Impersonation still uses Deception and can be detected normally.
At the start of each of your turns, you can switch among any of three prepared identities as a free action. Changing shape does not itself make you hidden or unnoticed.

mechanics.augmentationBenefit: Reduce the Bulk of one installed augmentation by 1, minimum light Bulk

feats.mechanic: You can communicate simple silent messages visually to creatures trained in Visual Communication Lore within 60 feet. Gain a +1 circumstance bonus when Aiding a visual social check.
If your chromatophores are sufficiently exposed and you have not moved since the end of your last turn, you can Hide without cover. Moving ends the benefit.
Choose one body system during daily preparations. It can hold one additional augmentation whose level is no greater than half your level. This does not create or discount the item.

feats.duration: until the end of your next turn
feats.mechanic: Become concealed. The effect ends early if you move more than 5 feet or use a hostile action.
You are concealed and can Hide without cover. Hostile actions do not end the effect, but you must remain within 10 feet of your position at the start of each turn or the effect ends.
You can Identify an item while holding it in any hand and gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Recall Knowledge about manufactured goods and trade routes.
Gain a 30-foot ranged unarmed Strike that deals 1d4 force damage and has the magical trait. It uses an active hand and can benefit from effects that improve unarmed attacks.

feats.trigger: You would take force damage and have a free active hand.
feats.mechanic: Gain resistance to the triggering damage equal to your level. If damage remains, store a force charge until the end of your next turn.
When you have a stored force charge, your next Vector Bolt before the charge expires deals two additional weapon damage dice and pushes the target 5 feet on a hit.
Choose any number of creatures in the area. They take 10d6 force damage and are pushed 10 feet on a critical failure.

mechanics.strikeAlteration: horn damage die becomes d8 and loses its maneuver trait

feats.mechanic: After examining a structure, map, machine, or route for 1 minute, gain a +1 circumstance bonus for 24 hours to Recall Knowledge about it and to checks made to navigate it.
Stride twice and make a horn Strike. Apply your multiple attack penalty only after completing the activity.
Ignore difficult terrain caused by stairs, narrow passages, debris, and artificial structures. You cannot become lost in a location you have mapped or traversed for at least 10 minutes.

feats.trigger: You or an ally within 30 feet fails a check or save against a trap, environmental hazard, or navigation effect.
feats.mechanic: The triggering creature rerolls the check or save and uses the better result.

feats.trigger: You fail an attack roll or a skill check involving movement, position, a structure, or a machine.
feats.mechanic: Reroll the triggering check and use the better result.
